name: GridLine.GridLineAttributes
summary: The GridLineAttributes class is the attributes class for the grid line.

constructors.name: GridLine.GridLineAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new default grid line attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: GridLine.GridLineAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new grid line attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

properties.name: CustomPresentation
properties.summary: Custom presentation GUID to be applied to the object type

properties.name: DrawOnlyTextLabelsNotGridLines
properties.summary: Set as true if you don't want to draw the grid lines, only show the grid lines' text labels.

properties.name: DrawTextAtEndOfGridLine
properties.summary: Set as true if you want to show the grid line's text label at the end of the line.

properties.name: DrawTextAtStartOfGridLine
properties.summary: Set as true if you want to show the grid line's text label at the start of the line.

properties.name: Frame
properties.summary: The frame attributes of the grid line's label.

properties.name: OffsetAtEndOfLine
properties.summary: The offset for the end of the grid line.

properties.name: OffsetAtStartOfLine
properties.summary: The offset for the beginning of the grid line.
